narrative:
Munroe Falls 3-A (precinct in Summit County) has 1,135 registered voters, with 50.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.5 percentage points.
